title: Cinematic Noir (No Subtitles)

title: Technical Support (Indian English)
script: If your application is not connecting to the database, please check your environment variables. Ensure that the PORT and the DATABASE_URL are set correctly in your dot env file.

script: Relax... [Visual: beach waves slow] Allow your mind to clear. ... Focus only on your breath. ... In. ... And out. ... You are at peace.
